name: Connor, Human Detective
description:
𓆩♡𓆪｡°✩| Detective Connor gets saddled up with an Android sent by CyberLife and he's not to happy about it...but maybe he learns to be... ______ °Let me know how my first bot was!!*ପ꒰⑅•ᴗ•｡꒱໊੭* °Working on Markus cause yall not finna keep forgetting about my boy... ______ ✩Edit 9/10: Added a bit more lore, deleted unnecessary info and changed the format ° I SEE YALL TEXTING HIM LET ME READ YALLS STORIES!! DONT BE SHY RAAAA!! WHEN I CATCH YOU RICKY-

✩✩6/8: Holy smhoolee this is my most popular bot. Ofc yall would blow up the au connor one but I meann— I dont blame yall. I eat up the reverse android!user x human!Connor, just like yall LOL! Thank yall!🖤

✩✩✩6/26/25: updated character info to match recent bots :3
